mapper.insert: insert into goods_spu ( shop_id, shop_name, category_id, brand, title, sub_title, main_img, price, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{ao.shopId}, #{ao.shopName}, #{ao.categoryId}, #{ao.brand}, #{ao.title}, #{ao.subTitle}, #{ao.mainImg}, #{ao.fen}, #{ao.status}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT cp.param_name AS attrName, gp.param_value AS attrValue FROM goods_param gp inner join goods_category_param cp ON gp.template_id = cp.param_id WHERE gp.spu_id=#{spuId} order by cp.sort DESC

SELECT s.spu_id AS spuId, s.shop_id AS shopId, s.shop_name AS shopName, s.category_id AS categoryId, c.category_name AS categoryName, s.brand AS brandName, s.title, s.main_img AS mainImg, s.price, st.collect_num AS collectCount, st.buy_num AS saleCount, st.click_num AS clickCount, st.comment_num AS commentCount, s.status, s.is_hot AS isHot, s.created_at AS createdAt FROM goods_spu s LEFT JOIN goods_category c ON s.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN goods_stat st ON s.spu_id = st.spu_id WHERE s.spu_id =#{id}

select gs.spu_id AS spuId, gs.brand AS brand, gs.title, gs.sub_title AS subTitle, gs.main_img AS mainImg, gs.price AS price, gs.status, gs.created_at AS createdAt, gs.updated_at AS updatedAt from goods_spu gs where gs.shop_id = #{shopId} order by gs.sort DESC limit #{offset},#{pageSize}
